shared_case_surface: bounded change cases that keep claimed verification, executed checks, skipped checks, blocked checks, and inferential confidence separately reviewable on the same honesty surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same verification-honesty question, keeps the executed-versus-claimed evidence inspectable, and still covers fully executable, partially executable, environment-blocked, and inspection-overclaim pressure on the bounded change surface.
public_safe_requirements: verification expectations remain inspectable to a bounded outside reviewer
blocked checks can be understood without private operational context
claimed versus actual verification evidence remains reviewable on the same case family
